extracted_claim.claim_summary: The customer claims a cardboard box corner is crushed.

image_assessments.notes: The image shows a hand opening a torn padded mailer, not a cardboard box.
The image shows a cardboard box with a visible crushed corner.

result.user_claim: Customer: The cardboard box corner is crushed. | Support: To confirm, cardboard box and not a mailer? | Customer: Correct, cardboard box corner. | Support: Is the product inside part of this claim? | Customer: No, package corner only.
result.evidence_standard_met_reason: At least one image shows the claimed package_corner with sufficient clarity to evaluate the claim.
result.claim_status_justification: Images confirm the claimed package_corner with visible crushed. Supporting images: img_2.
